name: Dianne Persall's Sloppy Joe Plan (Test)
recipeIngredient: Regular Joes - Sloppy Joes on Buns
Sloppy Joe Sauce - for freezer - serve on Potatoes
1 Pound Ground Beef Lean, On Sale If Possible
recipeInstructions:
1. Regular Joes: Whenever I find a good buy on beef, I cook up 3 or 4 pounds as sloppy joes. Combine the cooked ground beef, chopped onion, chopped green pepper, one or two sloppy joe mix packets (I have even substituted taco seasoning and it worked fine), then lots of ketchup, a little mustard, and 2 tablespoons cider vinegar and 2 tablespoons sugar. Serve the sloppy joes on buns.
2. Sloppy Joe Muffins - for freezer: Press biscuit dough into muffin tins and fill with sloppy joe meat. Bake until the biscuits are brown, then flash freeze them and put them in a large freezer bag. Serve with cheese or without, according to preference.
3. Sloppy Joe Sauce - for freezer, serve on Potatoes: Add one can of kidney beans and one can of black beans to the remaining sloppy joe meat. Serve this over baked potatoes for another meal. (The sloppy joe meat and beans can be frozen at this point).
4. Sloppy Joe Burritos - for freezer: Add frozen, shredded hash browns to the sloppy joe and bean mix, and roll up in tortillas as hand-held burritos. Flash freeze these and then wrap them individually. When reheating, serve with salsa.
